title: Clumpy Bros: Clumpy Fart
description: This mod allows you to fart and poop.
body:
![Clumpy Bros](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18687dd80feef348a9375afdcfb28892c8b76e73.png)
This mod is what the Clumpy Bros use in their videos to fart and poop. There are also custom advancements, a new Fart Count statistic, new items, and a custom config.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/00I7lUg-LUk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

We show off the farting throughout the above video.

<details>
<summary>Acquiring the Items and Functionality</summary>

- Farting: You can crouch and press the v key to fart. This will produce Poop occasionally.
- Poop: Obtained occasionally when farting. Can be thrown, eaten, used in place of bonemeal, or used to make a Poop Bucket. Thrown and eaten Poop applies certain effects. Poop has the same nourishment as a Poisonous Potato.
- Cooked Poop: Obtained by cooking Poop in a smoker or Campfire. Can be eaten and has the same nourishment as suspicious stew.
- Poop Bucket: Place poop above a bucket in the crafting interface to make. Places the Poop Block.
- Dried Poop Brick: Smelt Poop in a furnace.
- Poop Block (Full): Use the Poop Bucket on the ground to place the block.
- Poop Block (Layer): Making a Poop Golem will allow for the Poop Block to spawn when the Poop Golem walks. You can stack the layers to make a full block. Using Silk Touch will give you the layered block. Normal mining will give you Poop. Using a shovel mines it faster.
- The following blocks are obtained through crafting with Dried Poop Brick. Dried Poop Bricks, Dried Poop Bricks Slab, Dried Poop Bricks Stairs, and Dried Poop Bricks Wall.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Crafting Recipes</summary>
  
###   Crafting Grid
- Poop Bucket: 8 poop surrounding 1 bucket in the middle of the crafting grid.
- Dried Poop Bricks: 2 Dried Poop Brick diagonal with 2 Cooked Poop diagonal.
- Dried Poop Brick Slab, Stairs, and Wall: Normal recipe for each.
- Reversing Dried Poop Brick Stairs and Wall: place anywhere in the crafting grid.
- Reversing Dried Poop Brick Slab: 1 slab above 1 other slab anywhere in the crafting grid.

### Stonecutter
- Dried Poop Bricks: Dried Poop Brick Slab, Stairs, and Wall
- Dried Poop Brick Stairs and Wall: Dried Poop Bricks

### Furnace
- Dried Poop Brick: Put Poop in a Furnace.

### Smoker
- Cooked Poop: Put Poop in a Smoker.

### Camp Fire
- Cooked Poop: Place Poop on a Campfire.

### Poop Golem
- Same as Snow Golem but with Poop. 2 full Poop Blocks with a Carved Pumpkin or Jack o Lantern on top.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Advancements</summary>
There is a custom tab in the Advancements menu called Clumpy Fart. In this there are six advancements.

- Poop Acquired: Obtained by holding poop for the first time
- Farting Makes Me Feel Good: Fart 69 times
- Sloshing Around: Walk in a Poop Block
- YOU COOKED IT?: Cooking poop


<details>
<summary>Hidden Advancements</summary>

- Peak Human Efficiency: Eat Poop by holding crouch and whatever button you use to eat
- NO MORE DAIRY!: Fart 9009 times
- Silent Butt Deadly: Trigger a Sculk Sensor with a fart
- Absolutely Disgusting!: Eating cooked poop

</details>


</details>


<details>
<summary>Config</summary>

YOU SHOULD ONLY NEED THIS WHEN USING MODS LIKE YES STEVE MODEL.

The name of the config is: clumpyfart.json

You can reload the config in game with /fartreloadconfig

Inside the config you will see the following lines:

{
  "modelOffsets": {
    "fart_height": 0.35
  },
  "particleHorizontalOffset": -0.1
}

You can change the fart_height which moves the fart up and down.

The particleHorizontalOffset moves the fart in towards or out away from your character.

</details>

For any questions or issues not answered on this page join the Discord for support.

[![Join our Discord!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71d7f865966f83b55f1d9158c9c1d0c617106f91.png)](https://discord.gg/NcmC8e8CvA)
